An '''ora''' was a type of [[Gemstone/Legends|gemstone]] found on the<ref name="GCG" /> [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]]. The [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]],<ref name="GCG" /> a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to Bothawui,<ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref> used "Ora" as a first name for some members of the [[Gender/Legends|female]] sex.<ref name="GCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ora gemstones were first mentioned in the ''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'', a [[2003]] sourcebook for [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer|Peter Schweighofer]] and [[J.D. Wiker]]. They were only described in a table of Bothan female names.<ref name="GCG" />
